cadence_note: data.ameli.fr publishes no fixed release calendar. The annual series (cartographie des pathologies, demographie, honoraires, prescriptions) gain one observation year roughly 18 months after that year closes; the eight `-infra-annuelle` current-year snapshots are refreshed in place during the year. A monthly full re-fetch (the ODS /exports endpoint returns each dataset whole) picks up both without polling faster than the source moves.
